name: transaction-type-correction-purchase-to-refi
rationale: Broker initial intake frames as purchase. Subsequent correction clarifies the deal is actually a refinance. F1.TT inferential canonical field per R11-A must accept broker_correction tier override of broker_initial_intent tier. Tests inferential-field correction precedence + workflow-state transition implications (purchase doesn't require mortgage_statement; refi does — so missing-doc escalation may shift after correction).
notes: Two-event sequence. Distinct from A28 (which has same shape); F14 emphasizes the workflow-state-transition interaction.
